name: Ble Client → Ble Write
description: This action triggers a write to a specified BLE characteristic. The write is attempted in a best-effort fashion and will only succeed if the `ble_client`  's connection has been established and the peripheral exposes the expected BLE service and characteristic. Execution of the automation block sequence resumes after the write has completed. A write failure will *not* stop execution of succeeding actions (this allows a disconnect to be executed, for example.)

config_entries.label: Characteristic UUID
config_entries.description: UUID of the service's characteristic to write to.

config_entries.label: Service UUID
config_entries.description: UUID of the service to write to.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: ID of the associated BLE client.
